marketing.about_hero_button: See How The Hockey App Works
marketing.about_hero_p1: I'm Jon Morrison. I coach minor hockey and I have three daughters who play. I kept running into the same problem every family faces: getting kids to train at home without it turning into a fight. So I built something to fix it.
marketing.about_img_alt_garage: Young female hockey player training in her garage
marketing.about_img_alt_kid_driveway: Young hockey player practicing shooting in the driveway
marketing.about_section_cta_p1: The rink is where you compete. The garage, the basement, the driveway — that's where you get better. The players who separate themselves are the ones who put in the quiet reps when nobody's watching.
marketing.about_section_cta_p2: The Hockey App makes that training easy, fun, and something kids actually want to do. No nagging. No pressure. Just a clear plan and the motivation to show up every day.
marketing.about_story_p_built1: The Hockey App exists because I needed it. As a coach, I needed a way to give families clear weekly plans without creating more work for parents. As a dad, I needed a system my daughters could follow on their own so training happened without me standing over them.
marketing.about_story_p_built2: This isn't a tech company's idea of what hockey needs. It's a coach and father's answer to a problem I've lived with for over a decade.
marketing.about_story_p_daughters1: I'm also a hockey dad. I have three daughters who play. I've lived the exact tension I'm describing: trying to support without pushing, trying to encourage without nagging, trying to build discipline without creating resentment.
marketing.about_story_p_daughters2: That's the hardest part of being a hockey parent: you care deeply, but if you push too hard, your child pulls away.
marketing.about_story_p_pattern1: Years later, I became a coach. I've coached Abbotsford Hawks U7, U9, and U11. I've worked with Fraser Valley Kings development groups and been part of the BC Stars development environment. I've coached dozens of kids across multiple age groups.
marketing.about_story_p_pattern2: And I kept seeing the same pattern:
marketing.about_story_p_pattern3: Coaches would assign off-ice training. Parents would try to make it happen. Kids would resist. And every night, the same argument would play out in kitchens across the country: "Did you do your training?"
marketing.about_story_p_pattern4: The problem was never the kid's commitment. It was the lack of structure. There was no system. No clear plan. No way for the child to own it themselves.
marketing.about_story_p_philosophy1: I believe development happens through daily habits, not occasional intensity. I believe kids are more capable than we think, if we give them the structure to succeed. And I believe parents deserve to step back from being the enforcer and just be the supporter.
marketing.about_story_p_philosophy2: The Hockey App is designed around these beliefs. It's calm. It's structured. And it works because it removes friction instead of adding it.
marketing.about_story_p_started1: I grew up in the rink. I played junior hockey in the BCHL, lived in billets, trained year-round, and learned what it meant to be accountable to a team before I was old enough to vote.
marketing.about_story_p_started2: Hockey taught me structure. It taught me that talent matters less than consistency. And it taught me that the players who develop the fastest are the ones who do the quiet work: the unglamorous reps at home, in the garage, in the basement, when nobody is watching.
marketing.about_story_p_what1: The Hockey App gives coaches a simple way to assign structured off-ice training. Kids open the app, see their tasks for the day, and check them off. Parents get visibility without having to manage anything. Everyone stays aligned.
marketing.about_story_p_what2: No rankings. No pressure. No public leaderboards. Just quiet consistency, the kind that builds real athletes.
marketing.checkoff_tap_hint: Tap any task to mark complete
marketing.demo_coach_quote: "Finally, I can see who's putting in the work."
marketing.demo_hero_description: Coaches assign off-ice tasks. Kids check them off with fun rewards. Parents stay in control.
marketing.demo_player_feature_clear_tasks_detail: Know exactly what to do today
marketing.demo_player_quote: "My kids actually want to do their off-ice training now."
marketing.demo_privacy_no_comparisons_detail: Kids aren't ranked against each other
marketing.demo_privacy_nothing_public_detail: All data stays within your team
marketing.faq_q1: What if my team already has a Team Plan?
marketing.faq_q1_a: You're covered. If your coach purchased a Team Plan, every family on the roster gets full Pro access automatically — no individual subscription needed.
marketing.faq_q2: What if I already pay for Parent Pro and my team upgrades?
marketing.faq_q2_a: We'll notify you on your Settings page. You can cancel your individual subscription since you're already covered by the team — no double charging.
marketing.faq_q3_a: Yes. Coaches can create a team, assign workouts, and track participation at no cost. Coaching tools are always free.
marketing.faq_q4: Do parents have to pay to join a team?
marketing.faq_q4_a: No. Parents can join a team and see daily tasks for free. Pro features like full history, AI summaries, and structured programs require a Parent Pro subscription — unless the team has a Team Plan.
marketing.faq_q5: Can I use the app without a team?
marketing.faq_q5_a: Yes. Parents can sign up independently, start a 7-day free trial, and build training habits at home — no team required.

marketing.get_started_parent_desc_normal: Build consistent off-ice habits at home. 7-day free trial, then $15/mo. If your team has a plan, you're already covered.

marketing.home_cta_heading: Start building consistent habits at home.
marketing.home_cta_subtext: Give your child the structure to train on their own. See the difference in one week.
marketing.home_features_coaches_desc: Give your team a structured off-ice program without adding to your workload. See who is putting in the work at a glance.
marketing.home_features_description: In the garage. In the basement. On the driveway before dinner. The Hockey App was built for real life, not ideal conditions.
marketing.home_features_family_desc: Create a home development plan for your child. They follow their checklist, you follow their progress. No nagging required.
marketing.home_features_heading: It works where your kid actually trains.
marketing.home_features_level_desc: From first-year players building basics to competitive athletes grinding every day. The app scales to fit your player.
marketing.home_features_level_title: Works for any age or level
marketing.home_features_spring_desc: Set up a 30-day challenge or off-season program in minutes. Players stay sharp between seasons with a plan that runs itself.
marketing.home_features_spring_title: Run a spring or summer program
marketing.home_founder_img_alt: Jon Morrison with his three daughters in hockey gear
marketing.home_founder_p1: I'm Jon. I coach minor hockey and I have three kids who play. I've worked with players who have gone on to succeed at every level of the game, and I've seen firsthand what separates those who make it: consistent work at home, not just talent on the ice.
marketing.home_founder_p2: But I also lived the reality of being a busy coach and parent. The nightly argument: "Did you do your training?" Players showing up without putting in any work between practices. I realized the problem wasn't motivation. It was that nobody had a system that made it easy and fun to stay on track.
marketing.home_founder_p3: So I built one. The Hockey App gives kids a clear plan they can follow on their own. It gives coaches visibility into who's putting in the work, without adding to their already full plate. And it gives families structure without the stress.
marketing.home_founder_p4: As parents, the last thing we want is to pile on more pressure. But when training feels fun, rewarding, and even social, kids actually want to do it. That's when real growth happens, not because someone is forcing it, but because they're excited to show up.
marketing.home_founder_p5: I built this because I needed it for my own family, and for my own team.
marketing.home_hero_beta_free: Free during the beta. All features unlocked.
marketing.home_hero_subtext: A simple app that gives your child a daily training checklist they actually follow on their own.
marketing.home_hero_trial: Parents start with a 7-day free trial. Teams can cover families.
marketing.home_how_calendar_desc: The app pulls in your game and practice schedule automatically. Heavy training on off days, light work before games. No parent math required.
marketing.home_how_setup_desc: Tell us what your player needs to work on and we'll create the program. Daily checklists are ready to go, no planning required.
marketing.home_how_subtext: Coaches know that what happens off the ice matters just as much as what happens on it. But you're already stretched thin. You need a tool that makes home training easy, fun, and automatic.
marketing.home_how_team_desc: Players can follow their own program at home or train alongside teammates with a shared team plan. It works either way.
marketing.home_how_team_title: Train solo or with a team
marketing.home_problem_p1: You remind them once. Then twice. Then it turns into a fight. By the time they finally do it, nobody feels good about it.
marketing.home_problem_p2: It's not that your kid doesn't care. They just don't have a system that lets them own it. No clear plan. No structure. No way to feel proud of what they're doing without you standing over them.
marketing.home_problem_solution: The Hockey App gives every family that system.
marketing.home_results_coaches_see: Coaches see who's putting in work
marketing.home_results_subtext: You stop being the enforcer and start being the supporter. That's the shift families tell us about.
marketing.pricing_cancel_anytime_desc: No contracts. No lock-in. Cancel from your account settings in seconds.
marketing.pricing_coaches_desc: Create your team, assign workouts, and track participation — always free.
marketing.pricing_covers_roster: One purchase covers your entire roster.
marketing.pricing_cta_heading: Try one week of structured training.
marketing.pricing_cta_subtext: Get started free. Teams can cover families. Otherwise parents upgrade after a 7-day trial.
marketing.pricing_free_coaches: Free for coaches. Parents start with a 7-day trial. Teams can cover families.
marketing.pricing_free_trial_desc: Try Parent Pro for a full week. See the difference before you commit.
marketing.pricing_math_save: Save families up to $3,100 per year.
marketing.pricing_not_ready: Not ready to pay? No problem.

marketing.pricing_parent_pro_f6: One account covers all your children
marketing.pricing_parents_desc: Join a team, see daily tasks, and check off workouts. Pro features require a subscription.
marketing.pricing_privacy_first_desc: Your child's data stays private. No social feeds. No public comparison.
marketing.pricing_team_covered_desc: If your coach bought a Team Plan, you get full Pro access at no extra cost.
marketing.pricing_team_f2: Every family gets full Pro access
marketing.pricing_team_f3: Coach purchaser gets Pro access too
marketing.pricing_team_f4: AI weekly summaries for entire roster

teamLevel.subtitle: This adjusts targets automatically (shots, time, reps)
teamLevel.title: What level is your team?

trainingMode.balancedDescription: Shooting + light conditioning + mobility. Most teams choose this.
trainingMode.performanceDescription: Higher volume. Conditioning + recovery included. Best for Rep/Elite teams.
trainingMode.shootingOnlyDescription: Track shots and simple daily reps. Minimal setup.
trainingMode.subtitle: Choose a training style that fits your team
trainingMode.title: How do you want to use this app?

walkthrough.keyboardHint: Press → or Enter to continue • Esc to skip
walkthrough.step1Description: This is your command center. From here you'll create workouts, track your players' progress, and keep everyone motivated. Let's show you around.
walkthrough.step2Description: Start here—add a workout for today or any date. Pick the drills, set shot counts, and your players will see it instantly. Takes just a minute.
walkthrough.step3Description: Set up Monday through Sunday once, then reuse it. Perfect for establishing a consistent training routine your players can follow every week.
walkthrough.step4Description: Tell us your goals and timeline, and AI creates 4–8 weeks of progressive training. No planning required—just review and apply.
walkthrough.step5Description: Share your team code with players and parents. They'll join in seconds, see assigned workouts, and start checking off tasks right away.
walkthrough.step6Description: See who's training and who needs encouragement. Connect your team calendar to auto-detect game days, and watch completion rates in real time.

workoutMethod.aiDescription: Generates drafts based on your preferences. You review and publish.
workoutMethod.aiTitle: Help me build them with AI
workoutMethod.manualDescription: Use the manual workout builder only.
workoutMethod.subtitle: You can always change your mind later
workoutMethod.title: How do you want to create workouts?
